Visitors

Places to Stay

Holly Cottage is within the village itself. Kippford View Holiday Park and Kirkennan Estate Holiday Cottages are both within view of Palnackie. Buittle Castle is a short drive away.

Kippford View Holiday Park

Palnackie, DG7 1PF

A caravan park that hires out a number of self-catering caravans and glamping pods. They also have room for tents, tourers, camper vans and motorhomes.

Contact

☎
01557 870 267
✉ info@gillespie-leisure.co.uk
🌐 gillespie-leisure.co.uk
f Facebook

Raider's Rest

Palnackie, DG7 1PF

Farm glamping

Contact

☎
🌐
f Facebook

Kirkennan Estate Holiday Cottages

Palnackie, DG7 1PE

Three self-catering cottages set among formal lawns, a walled garden, and woodland and fields on the banks of the River Urr. The Mews sleeps 5 in 2 bedrooms, Kirkennan Lodge sleeps 7 in 4 bedrooms, and Woodsedge sleeps 5 in 3 bedrooms. All cottages welcome up to 3 well-behaved dogs. EV charging points available.

Contact

☎
01556 600438
07896 337079
🌐 kirkennan.co.uk
f Facebook

Buittle Castle

DG7 1PA (between Palnackie and Dalbeattie)

Bed & breakfast accommodation in a historic building. Afternoon teas run from April to September, along with tours of the grounds and interiors. Also available as a wedding venue.

Contact

☎
01556 509 072
✉ manager@buittlecastle.co.uk
🌐 buittlecastle.co.uk
f Facebook
